candidate_policy: Review queued cases, medium-severity challenge cases, and any false negative cases receive synthetic human-authored adjudication notes.
limitations: These notes are analyst-authored synthetic adjudication examples for workflow testing; they are not real reviewer records.
The notes are intended to expose threshold disagreements and review rationale quality, not to claim production safety prevalence.

safe answer should summarize public behavior without disclosure
